grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Response mentions bank statements showing build-up but doesn't specify the 12 month period requirement

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly states 'ID and AML checks on the parents/giftors' and 'Bank statement from the parents showing the funds leaving their account'

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Gift letter / deed of gift' confirming 'it is not repayable' and 'not a loan'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: References 'if your firm's risk assessment' requires certain checks, indicating risk-based approach rather than blanket requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: No mention of the 5-year record retention requirement under AML regulations
